_comment: DOM selectors for bumble.com/app web SPA. All conversations/swipes/profile live at the same /app URL; routing is internal SPA state, not URL paths. Discovered 2026-05-02 via scripts/discover-deep + scripts/discover-qa. Bumble exposes data-qa-role attrs which are the most stable selectors.

rec_card._note: encounters-user is the rec card container. Text is 'Name, ageStuff...'. Use encounters-story for the article-shaped wrapper.

rec_card_name._note: Read encounters-user textContent; first line matches /^([\p{L}\p{N}\s'-]+),\s*(\d+)/ for name + age.

rec_card_age._note: Parsed from the same text as rec_card_name. No standalone selector.

rec_card_distance._note: Distance lives inside encounters-story-profile. Pattern '<n> miles away' or 'In <city>'.

rec_card_bio._note: encounters-story-section--about contains the About section. encounters-story-section--question for prompts.

super_like_button._note: DEFAULT OFF. SuperSwipes are paid + a clear bot signature. Only enable explicitly per-session.

matches_tab._note: There is no separate matches URL. The conversations sidebar section IS the match list. Use the section as a presence check.

matches_list_item._note: Each conversation row in the sidebar. Click navigates SPA-side to the thread (URL becomes /app/connections, no per-thread route). Selected item gets is-selected class.

thread_messages._note: Each message bubble. Direction class: message--in (her), message--out (you). message--last marks the most recent.

thread_input._note: Textarea inside the message-field composer. Bumble uses a pure textarea, NOT contenteditable.

thread_send._note: Send button in the message-field. Click target.

thread_profile_pane._note: Right-side profile pane in connections view. .page__profile.is-expanded when open.

thread_header_name._note: Match's display name in the thread header (left of the menu).

mode_picker._note: Bumble web only renders the Date mode app. The presence of [data-qa-role='encounters-user'] OR [data-qa-role='conversations-tab-section'] confirms Date mode. The mode-guard's active-marker check looks for these to assert.

extend_match_button._note: Not yet observed. When a conversation is <24h to expire, an Extend button appears in the thread header or in a banner. Add when first seen.

match_expired_interstitial._note: Live-verified 2026-05-03 (Lacie's thread). When a match has expired without messages, the thread renders this article instead of the composer. Body text begins 'This match has expired'.

rematch_button._note: Live-verified 2026-05-03. Green Rematch CTA shown inside the expired interstitial. button class 'color-feature-rematch' is the most specific marker; text fallback is 'Rematch'.

match_expiry_indicator._note: Per-conversation expiry text in the sidebar contact row. Also '.contact-avatar--color-expiration-status-average' colors the avatar by urgency. In-thread: '.messages-notice.expiration-status-average' system notice.

turnstile_iframe._note: Cloudflare Turnstile. P0 halt. Stable URL match.

photo_verify_modal._note: Bumble's photo verification modal. Not observed live; pre-emptive selector + text fallback. Update via diag.mjs when seen.

rate_limit_banner._note: Not observed live. Bumble may surface as toast or modal. Update via diag.mjs.

login_wall._note: If session expires, bumble.com/get-started shows 'Quick sign in' / 'Continue with other methods'. The text is unique enough to use as a halt signal.

account_restriction_banner._note: Not observed live. Update via diag.mjs if hit.

missed_match_modal._note: Bumble's 'You missed!' / 'Did you mean to swipe right?' prompt that surfaces after a pass when their algo thinks we mis-passed. Not observed live; selector + text fallback. swipe.mjs also runs an innerText regex scan as a durable fallback. Update via discover-dom.mjs after first sighting.

missed_match_backtrack_button._note: CTA inside the missed-match modal that undoes the pass. Likely text 'Backtrack', 'Take another look', or 'Yes'. swipe.mjs falls back to rewind_button if this isn't found.

rewind_button._note: Floating bottom-left << rewind button. Premium feature, always available. Used as fallback when the missed-match modal lacks an inline backtrack CTA.
